description: With its acute hearing, it can pick up sounds from far away. It usually hides in quiet places.

attacks.name: Fairy Power
attacks.effect: Return 1 of your Pokémon and all cards attached to it to your hand.

name: Clefable

description: DNA from a space virus mutated and became a Pokémon. It appears where auroras are seen.

attacks.name: Cell Storm
attacks.effect: Discard 2 Psychic Energy attached to Deoxys and remove 6 damage counters from Deoxys.

name: Deoxys

description: This Pokémon completely controls the flow of time. It uses its power to travel at will through the past and future.

attacks.name: Time Rewind
attacks.effect: Shuffle your hand into your deck.

name: Dialga

description: It uses the fine hair that covers its body to sense air currents and predict its enemy's actions.

attacks.name: Solar Suggestion
attacks.effect: Move up to 4 damage counters from any of your Pokémon to any of your opponent's Pokémon in any way you like.

attacks.name: Psybeam
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

name: Espeon

description: Its entire body is shielded by a steel-hard shell. What lurks inside this shell is a total mystery.

attacks.name: Mirror Shot
attacks.effect: If the Defending Pokémon tries to attack during your opponent's next turn, your opponent flips a coin. If tails, that attack does nothing.

attacks.name: Everyone Explode Now
attacks.effect: Does 30 damage times the number of Pineco and Forretress you have in play. This attack does 30 damage to each of your Pineco and Forretress in play.

name: Forretress

description: Said to have expanded the lands by evaporating water with raging heat. It battled titanically with Kyogre.

attacks.name: Volcano Stomp
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, discard the top 4 cards of your opponent's deck. If tails, discard the top 4 cards of your deck.

name: Groudon

description: Once it appears, it goes on a rampage. It remains enraged until it demolishes everything around it.

attacks.name: Hyper Beam
attacks.effect: Discard an Energy card attached to the Defending Pokémon.

name: Gyarados

description: It launches kicks while spinning. If it spins at high speed, it may bore its way into the ground.

attacks.name: Triple Kick
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Close Combat
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, any damage done to Hitmontop by attacks is increased by 20 (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

name: Hitmontop

description: Legends claim this Pokémon flies the world's skies continuously on its magnificent seven-colored wings.

attacks.name: Scorching Wing
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, discard all Fire Energy attached to Ho-Oh.

name: Ho-Oh

description: Upon hearing its eerie howls, other Pokémon get the shivers and head straight back to their nests.

attacks.name: Fire Counterattack
attacks.effect: If your opponent has any Fighting Pokémon in play, this attack does 20 damage plus 60 more damage.

attacks.name: Dark Roar
attacks.effect: Your opponent discards a card from his or her hand.

name: Houndoom

description: Generations have believed that any wish written on a note on its head will come true when it awakens.

abilities.name: Stardust Song
abilities.effect: Once during your turn, when you put Jirachi from your hand onto your Bench, you may flip 3 coins. For each heads, search your discard pile for a Psychic Energy card and attach it to Jirachi.

attacks.name: Time Hollow
attacks.effect: Choose a number of your opponent's Stage 1 or Stage 2 Evolved Pokémon up to the amount of Energy attached to Jirachi. Remove the highest Stage Evolution card from each of those Pokémon and put those cards back into your opponent's hand.

name: Jirachi

description: A mythical Pokémon said to have swelled the seas with rain and tidal waves. It battled with Groudon.

attacks.name: Destructive Tsunami
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 40 damage to each of your opponent's Pokémon. If tails, this attack does 40 damage to each of your Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Kyogre

description: When you see Leafeon asleep in a patch of sunshine, you'll know it is using photosynthesis to produce clean air.

attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.effect: This attack's damage isn't affected by Resistance.

description: It is said to be the guardian of the seas. It is rumored to have been seen on the night of a storm.

If you do, choose a Supporter card you find there and use the effect of that card as the effect of this power. This power can't be used if Smeargle is affected by a Special Condition.

attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 40 damage plus 30 more damage.

description: It is said to be the guardian of the seas. It is rumored to have been seen on the night of a storm.

attacks.name: Linear Attack
attacks.effect: Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. This attack does 30 damage to that Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Lugia

description: Its total control over the boundaries of space enable it to transport itself to faraway places or even other dimensions.

attacks.name: Wormhole
attacks.effect: Switch Palkia with 1 of your Benched Pokémon. Then, your opponent switches the Defending Pokémon with 1 of his or her Benched Pokémon.

name: Palkia

description: A Pokémon that races across the land while barking a cry that sounds like crashing thunder.

abilities.name: Extreme Speed
abilities.effect: Raikou's Retreat Cost is Colorless less for each Lightning Energy attached to Raikou.

attacks.name: Raging Thunder
attacks.effect: Does 20 damage to 1 of your Pokémon, and don't apply Weakness and Resistance to this damage.

name: Raikou
